Name: US-1.1: Register an account
Description:
As a/the new user
I want create an account with my name, email, username, and password
So that I can sign in and manage my own private todo lists

Spec: features/feature-1-user-auth.md
Story ID: TS-F1-US1.1
Branch: feature/1-*

Name: US-1.2: Sign in
Description:
As a/the registered user
I want sign in with my username and password
So that I can access the application dashboard securely

Spec: features/feature-1-user-auth.md
Story ID: TS-F1-US1.2
Branch: feature/1-*

Name: US-1.3: Stay signed in across page loads
Description:
As a/the signed-in user
I want my session to persist in the browser
So that I do not have to sign in again every time I refresh the page

Spec: features/feature-1-user-auth.md
Story ID: TS-F1-US1.3
Branch: feature/1-*

Name: US-1.4: Sign out
Description:
As a/the signed-in user
I want sign out
So that no one else can use my account on a shared device

Spec: features/feature-1-user-auth.md
Story ID: TS-F1-US1.4
Branch: feature/1-*

Name: US-1.5: Block unauthenticated access
Description:
As a/the application
I want require a valid session for all non-auth screens
So that users can only see and modify their own data

Spec: features/feature-1-user-auth.md
Story ID: TS-F1-US1.5
Branch: feature/1-*
